values: YouTube Tools Hub — 6-Month High-CPC Content Plan (v2)
Jul 2026 – Dec 2026  •  96 Posts  •  4 Posts/Week  •  Base Dec target $7.3K/mo  •  Stretch $23.51K/mo
Shift from 'YouTube tools' ($0.10–$0.50 CPC) to 'YouTube creator business' ($5–$22 CPC) by adding LLC/tax/insurance/finance angles
US-first commercial content plus global discovery content. Country-specific legal, tax, and insurance claims are deferred until localized keyword research and expert review are in place.
Operate 8 clusters as 8 pillars plus 88 supporting posts = 96 total. The calendar now carries a provisional cluster and pillar role for every post.
60% of posts target commercial/transactional intent (LLC setup, software comparisons, gear reviews) to attract SaaS + B2B ad bids
Use a $3,000 December affiliate base case and retain $6,500 only as a conditional stretch target after 30/60/90-day validation.
Track qualified earned referring domains separately from owned/social distribution. Base target: 125 net new qualified domains, ending at 210; no DA guarantee.
For legal, tax, insurance, credit, investment, and contract posts: require a subject-matter review, primary sources, a visible update date, and an appropriate disclaimer before publishing.
Repurpose only after the source post passes its publish gate. The previous 5x claim is removed because the listed output volume is seven derivative assets per post.
Generated by Z.ai • Research basis: Adstimate, Publift, Miraflow, Precedence Research, Ahrefs/Semrush keyword data • Jul 2026

6-MONTH TRAFFIC & REVENUE PROJECTION — Operational Base Case (v2)
1. The base case is an operating forecast: 12K baseline views to 180K by December. The 650K traffic figure is a stretch scenario, not the plan's commitment.
2. AdSense revenue is formula-driven: monthly traffic × RPM ÷ 1,000. Keyword CPC is a topic-prioritization proxy, not an RPM or revenue input.
3. Affiliate, sponsorship, and digital-product targets must be reforecast at 30/60/90 days using attributed revenue, not assumed conversion rates.
4. Base authority goal: 125 new qualified earned referring domains, ending at 210. Do not count owned, social, or nofollow distribution as earned RDs.
5. Stretch December scenario: 650K views × $15.40 RPM = $10,010 AdSense; +$6,500 affiliate +$6,500 sponsorship +$500 digital = $23,510/month.
6. Calendar cadence is 12 / 17 / 18 / 17 / 17 / 15 posts by calendar month; cumulative totals are aligned to the actual scheduled dates.
7. Any legal, tax, insurance, credit, investment, or contract post is blocked until its review gate is complete.
